subparts.text: Explain the three modes of heat transfer and their relevance to envelope design. 2.5 1
What are the physiological effects of air conditioning on human comfort? 2.5 1
How does climate influence the requirements for space conditioning? 2.5 1
How does humidity control impact the efficiency of HVAC systems? 2.5 2
Discuss the difference between direct and indirect evaporative cooling systems. 2.5 2
How can energy simulation software like Design Builder be used in HVAC system design? 2.5 2
Discuss the role of solar energy in air conditioning systems. 2.5 2

questions.question_text: Discuss the importance of shading devices in enhancing the thermal performance of a building envelope. 1

Explain the concept of Window-to-Wall Ratio and analyze its impact on energy efficiency in buildings. Discuss how optimizing the WWR can balance thermal performance, daylighting, and visual comfort. 1
Evaluate the various types of air conditioners and their suitability for different building types. 2
Explain the working principles of propeller fans and centrifugal fans. Highlight their applications in HVAC systems. 2
Explain the role of Air Handling Units and cooling tower in HVAC systems. 2
Evaluate the impact of poor duct planning on the performance of HVAC systems, with a focus on its consequences for energy efficiency and overall system effectiveness. 3
Compare active and passive radiant cooling mechanisms, discussing their suitability for different climates. 3
Discuss the impact of climate on space conditioning requirements with examples from hot and humid, hot and dry, and cold climates. 3
